channel.title: Tooling on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Tooling on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Oracle to PostgreSQL migration tooling in Visual Studio Code
item.description:
Microsoft announced a public preview of Oracle-to-PostgreSQL migration tooling built into the Azure Database for PostgreSQL extension for Visual Studio Code. The tool aims to make migrating from Oracle to PostgreSQL simpler and faster by providing conversion support directly inside VS Code.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: dotnet: Introducing F# 10
item.description:
The blog post announces F# 10, highlighting new language features, performance improvements, and tooling enhancements that ship with .NET 10.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: devops+ai: 🔥Fixing MCP Tool Name Collisions When Using Multiple MCP Servers
item.description:
The article explains why multiple MCP servers often all register a tool named “search”, causing name collisions when a client aggregates tools from more than one server, and gives short-term and long-term fixes (namespacing, unique IDs, client-side resolution changes, or upstream fixes).

  • Source: Let’s do DevOps

item.title: dotnet: Upgrading to Microsoft Agent Framework in Your .NET AI Chat App
item.description:
This DevBlogs post provides a step-by-step guide to upgrading a .NET AI chat app to the Microsoft Agent Framework to improve architecture, enable better tool integration, and add intelligent reasoning features.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: dotnet: Introducing Microsoft Agent Framework (Preview): Making AI Agents Simple for Every Developer
item.description:
Microsoft announced the Microsoft Agent Framework (Preview), a unified solution for creating, orchestrating, hosting, and observing AI agents in the .NET ecosystem to help developers ship production AI agents faster.

  • Source: .NET
